scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:deploy: npm run android:build && adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && adb shell am start -n com.tinnitus.suite/.MainActivity
